<?php namespace Spatie\Html\Elements\Attributes; /** * @method static valueIf(bool $condition, string|null $value) * @method static valueIfNotNull(bool $condition, string|null $value) * @method static valueUnless(bool $condition, string|null $value) */ trait Value { /** * @param string|null $value * * @return static */ public function value($value) { return $this->attribute('value', $value); } }
